name: @progress-checker/infrastructure-cdk
description: AWS CDK infrastructure for KCL Progress Board.

scripts.lint: pnpm run format:check --silent && biome lint . && pnpm run typecheck --silent
scripts.synth: pnpm run synth:stg --silent && pnpm run synth:prod --silent
scripts.synth:stg: pnpm run build --silent && cdk synth -c stage=stg
scripts.synth:prod: pnpm run build --silent && cdk synth -c stage=prod
scripts.cdk:lint: pnpm run lint --silent && pnpm run synth --silent --
scripts.cdk:plan:stg: pnpm run build --silent && cdk diff --all -c stage=stg
scripts.cdk:plan:prod: pnpm run build --silent && cdk diff --all -c stage=prod
scripts.cdk:apply:stg: pnpm run build --silent && cdk deploy --all -c stage=stg
scripts.cdk:apply:prod: pnpm run build --silent && cdk deploy --all -c stage=prod
